title: Cross-Currency Transfer (FX Transfer)
story: As an Active Recorder, I want to record a transfer between two accounts of different currencies by entering both the source and target amounts manually, so that I can accurately log FX transactions without the system imposing an exchange rate.
acceptance_criteria: The transfer flow detects when the source and target accounts have different currencies
When currencies differ, the UI presents two amount fields: one in the source account's currency and one in the target account's currency
When currencies are the same, only a single amount field is shown (standard transfer)
Both amounts must be entered; the transfer cannot be saved with only one amount in FX mode
Both transaction legs are recorded with their respective currency codes
